creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
The best stat I know about is https://bsdstats.org/bt/ports/category/sysutils.html , which is not perfect (e.g. not everyone installs bsdstats). According to it, there are 43 installations of the port.

Maybe deprecate the port with a far enough EXPIRATION_DATE, so that people have the time to stop the expiration if they still really need it?
